name: Cranberry Sauce (Smooth)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the cranberries and water to the simmering point.
2. Simmer for 15 minutes, until the berries have burst and the liquid takes on a syrup-like consistency.
3. Strain mixture through a sieve; discard berry skins.
4. To hot liquid, add gelatin, sweetener, and 1 or 2 drops blue food coloring, stirring until dissolved.
5. Pour into a 3-cup gelatin mold and chill overnight.
Makes 12 (1/4-cup) servings. Each serving is 1/4 fruit, approximately 11 calories.
